payload.chatText: I want to keep my current routine for years.

response.summary: Projected strain stays relatively low, with only mild pressure on lungs and heart. Keeping these habits steady should help keep long-term risk flatter.

payload.chatText: How bad could this get over 20 years?

response.summary: Projected long-term strain is highest in heart, liver and brain. Reducing high-risk habits could meaningfully flatten these trajectories over time.

payload.chatText: I am tired all the time and rarely work out.

response.summary: Projected long-term strain is highest in heart, body fat and brain. Reducing high-risk habits could meaningfully flatten these trajectories over time.
